ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* The date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* The date of the last maintenance */,
  "latitude" REAL /* The latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* The longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* The elevation of the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current operational status of the station (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant (e.g., NO2, NOX, NO, SO2, SPM) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the pollutant */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the pollutant */,
  "threshold" REAL /* The threshold value for the pollutant that triggers an alert */,
  "health_impact" TEXT /* The potential health impact of the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station that collected the reading */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the reading was collected */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the reading was collected */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant being measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "sensor_id" TEXT /* The unique identifier for the sensor that collected the reading */,
  "method" TEXT /* The method used to collect the reading (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* The accuracy of the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password of the user for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location from which the access was made (e.g., IP geolocation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that triggered the alert */,
  "threshold" TEXT /* Type of threshold exceeded (e.g., NO2, NOX) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* The severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* The action taken in response to the alert */,
  "responsible_user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user responsible for handling the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_responsible_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytical_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading used in the analysis */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytical model used */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was generated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* The version of the analytical model used */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* The confidence interval of the result */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytical_results_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)
